text:
Market today: Risk-off mood driven by U.S. striking Iran and escalating Middle East tension. That's a classic tech/growth selloff trigger — investors rotate to safety. Your margin account amplifies every down move, so this environment is genuinely dangerous for your concentrated book.

Your holdings: AVGO is your biggest problem — down 16% and on a SELL signal with your largest position size. Margin makes this hurt double. PLTR is down 13% and also flashing SELL — two big losers at once is a red flag on a margin account. SPAL is a 2x leveraged SpaceX ETF already down nearly 17%, and SpaceX bonds are flashing warning signs today — that's a direct hit to your SpaceX exposure. SPCX is brand-new, very volatile, and has almost no track record to lean on.

Watch: (1) Whether AVGO breaches your $336 stop — that's your line in the sand on your largest position. (2) Any escalation headlines out of Iran/Strait of Hormuz overnight.

Bottom line: Two SELLs bleeding on margin, a leveraged SpaceX bet getting hit from two directions — tighten up before the market decides for you.
